_meta.notes: The lead signer at Cataract Mile. Communicates entirely in hand-signs over the constant water-roar.

tagline: all hands, no voice; can convey contract terms in eleven gestures.

firstMeet.subject: [written. all letters from me are written.]
firstMeet.body:
You will not have heard me. I have not spoken in seven years; the cataract eats voices anyway, and I have learned to do without. But you read my hands when I signed the third clause, which most do not, and so I have written this in case you come back. 

The contract terms I gave were the public ones. There are private ones for those who can sign back. Find me at the lower stair after the noon-bell.

— Aune

metadata.voice: silent in the prose; everything is gestures + a barely-audible accompanying hum
